blocker_reason: GAPI VM runs kubeadm v1.32.13; upgrading to v1.36.x is a multi-step process outside this validation scope.
commands_run: virsh qemu-agent-command h462-gateway-kubeadm-1780668538 guest-exec (hostname, kubelet --version, kubeadm version)
limitations: kubeadm cluster version v1.32.13 does not match target v1.36.x
QEMU guest agent available for command execution only
prerequisites_for_retest: Install kubeadm/kubelet/kubectl v1.36.x packages from Kubernetes apt repo
Upgrade or reinitialize cluster at v1.36.x
